2606.23406.title: HyperQuant: A Rate-Distortion-Optimal Quantization Pipeline for Large Language and Diffusion Models
2606.23406.paper_summary:
We present HyperQuant (Hadamard, optimallY Packing, Entropy Rice-coding), a unified post-training quantization pipeline for the weights and the KV cache of large language and diffusion transformers. Across a suite of self-contained experiments (Table 1), HyperQuant outperforms the recent HIGGS scheme at every operating point from 3 to 5 bits per scalar (bps) on weights, and beats both TurboQuant and OCTOPUS on KV quantization down to 1.7 bps. Beyond the LLM setting, HyperQuant quantizes the 19B-parameter LTX-2 DiT video model with no observable per-frame artifacts. End-to-end on an H100 at 4 bps, HyperQuant compresses the linear weights ~3.9x and the KV cache ~3.79x at near-lossless quality.
  HyperQuant combines four known ideas into a single construction: (i) a per-tile Randomized Hadamard Transform that makes the per-coordinate distribution of weights and activations approximately Gaussian; (ii) quantization to a low-dimensional optimal lattice (E8, D4, A2, or Z); (iii) lossless bit-stripping and near-entropy-optimal variable-length Rice coding of the lattice indices; and (iv) bias-correction methods for the KV cache that keep the reconstruction unbiased under inner products, preserving attention semantics. We further integrate the pipeline with 8-bit and 4-bit Tensor-Core MMA paths (fp8-e4m3, int8, nvfp4, mxfp4), and find that int8 beats fp8 on the post-RHT lattice output. Project page: https://moonmath.ai/hyperquant/
2606.23406.paper_summary_zh:
我們提出了 HyperQuant（Hadamard, optimallY Packing, Entropy Rice-coding），這是一個統一的後訓練量化管道，用於大型語言模型和擴散Transformer的權重和 KV 快取。在一系列自包含的實驗中（表 1），HyperQuant 在每個操作點上從 3 到 5 位元每標量（bps）在權重上超越了最近的 HIGGS 計劃，並且在 KV 量化上擊敗了 TurboQuant 和 OCTOPUS，達到 1.7 bps。超越 LLM 設定，HyperQuant 對 19B 參數的 LTX-2 DiT 視頻模型進行量化，且未觀察到每幀的可見伪影。在 H100 上以 4 bps 的端到端運行中，HyperQuant 將線性權重壓縮約 3.9 倍，KV 快取壓縮約 3.79 倍，且質量接近無損。

HyperQuant 將四個已知的概念結合為一個單一的構造：（i）每個區塊的隨機 Hadamard 變換，使得權重和激活的每個坐標分佈近似為高斯；（ii）量化到低維的最佳晶格（E8、D4、A2 或 Z）；（iii）無損位元剝離和接近熵最優的可變長度 Rice 編碼晶格索引；以及（iv）對 KV 快取的偏差修正方法，保持重建在內積下無偏，保留注意力語義。我們進一步將管道與 8 位和 4 位的 Tensor-Core MMA 路徑（fp8-e4m3、int8、nvfp4、mxfp4）整合，並發現 int8 在後 RHT 晶格輸出上超越了 fp8。項目頁面：https://moonmath.ai/hyperquant/
2606.23406.author: Yuval Domb et.al.
2606.23406.authors: Yuval Domb, Hadar Sackstein, Tomer Solberg
